message:
fix(config,tests): deterministic scope update ordering and TempDir lifetime in package toggle tests

Package toggle persistence previously iterated scope_updates in
HashMap-order, making the emitted JSON array non-deterministic across
runs. Identical toggle state could produce different file contents,
breaking content-addressed caching and making diffs noisy.

Changes:
- Collect scope_updates entries not already in updated_sources into a
  Vec, sort by source name, then iterate — ensuring stable JSON output
  regardless of HashMap iteration order
- Store TempDir handle in ConfigOverridePackageToggleFixture (_temp
  field) so the temporary directory lives as long as the fixture; the
  previous code dropped TempDir immediately after construction, leaving
  cwd and global_dir pointing at a deleted directory on some platforms

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
